businessJustification: ABC Infotech Pvt Ltd submitted the L1 (lowest) quote at ₹37.80L against a budget of ₹40L. The vendor holds an active Dell Authorized Partner certificate, is KYC-verified, and has a prior SLA adherence score of 98.2% from last year's IT refresh engagement. Full technical compliance confirmed. 3-year on-site warranty reduces lifecycle risk.
comparisonSummary: 3 vendors invited, 3 quotes received. ABC Infotech (L1 @ ₹37.8L, Full Compliance) vs HDFC Solutions (L2 @ ₹39.2L, Partial Compliance) vs MoneyWise Financial (L3 @ ₹40.5L, Full Compliance). Budget saving of ₹2,20,000 vs allocated budget. Recommendation: ABC Infotech.

workflowHistory.remarks: L1 vendor identified. All 3 quotes reviewed and compared. Forwarding to Procurement Manager for review.

businessJustification: ABC Infotech Pvt Ltd offers the lowest-cost proposal at ₹22L against a budget of ₹24L, saving ₹2L (8.3%). ISO 9001:2015 certified, KYC-approved, with proven track record of facility management at 5 existing sites. The vendor includes digital attendance tracking and monthly MIS reporting at no additional cost.

remarks: Approved. PO to be issued to ABC Infotech Pvt Ltd immediately. Ensure AMC terms are captured in the contract.

businessJustification: ABC Infotech Pvt Ltd is CERT-In empanelled and is the only vendor providing full-scope coverage for both AWS and Azure environments. Their L1 bid at ₹12.5L saves ₹2.5L vs budget. The report format is IRDAI-compliant and supports regulatory submission directly. Engagement timeline of 45 days meets our security audit deadline for annual IRDAI filing.

Clear single-vendor selection justified.

rfqTitle: Corporate Travel Management System SaaS – Rejected
businessJustification: HDFC Solutions Ltd offered the most comprehensive travel SaaS with native SAP integration and GSTIN auto-validation. Submitted for approval prior to quote closing for budget planning purposes.
comparisonSummary: This approval was rejected due to budget freeze on non-critical IT SaaS expenditure for Q2 FY2026-27. The RFQ will be re-floated in Q3 FY2026-27 with updated specifications.
remarks: Rejected – Budget freeze on non-critical IT SaaS for Q2. Please re-submit in Q3 FY2026-27 with updated business case.
